data.title: First Bank Announces First Quarter 2026 Net Income of $7.6 Million
data.description: Robust net interest margin and operational efficiency contribute to the growth of tangible book value. This growth is driven by a strong net interest margin and efficient operations, which are key factors in the expansion of tangible book value.

data.title: Lifezone Announces Release Date of Q1 2026 Interim Financial Results and Notice of Investor Webcast
data.description: Lifezone Metals Limited (NYSE: LZM) will unveil its Q1 2026 interim financial results on April 30, 2026. The Investor Webcast is scheduled for April 30, 2026, at 10:00 a.m. ET | 15:00 p.m. BST, led by CEO Chris Showalter and CFO Ingo Hofmaier. A conference call and Q&A session will be hosted on the same day. Interested analysts and investors can register at the Lifezone Metals Q1 2026 Interim Financial Results Webcast. To receive Lifezone Metals news alerts, registration is available.

data.title: Benchmark Senior Living at Chelmsford Crossings Assisted Living Community Named Among Nation's Best in 2026 U.S. News & World Report Senior Living Ratings
data.description: Benchmark Senior Living at Chelmsford Crossings, located in Chelmsford, Massachusetts, achieved top honors as one of the premier senior living communities due to exceptional resident and family feedback. The Assisted Living community was lauded for its outstanding services and facilities. The recognition was awarded on April 27, 2026, signifying the high level of satisfaction among residents and their families.

data.title: Phibro Animal Health Corporation Announces Regulatory Framework Change in Brazil for Antimicrobials
data.description: Phibro Animal Health Corporation (Nasdaq: PAHC) has revealed plans for the adoption of a revised regulatory system in Brazil concerning the utilization of specific antimicrobials with growth promotion labels. The Brazilian Ministry of Agriculture and Livestock (MAPA) introduced Ordinance No. 1617 on April 27, 2026, which bans the importation, production, sale, and application of performance-boosting feed supplements containing antimicrobials categorized as important.

data.title: Amkor Stock Climbs On Strong Q1 Earnings: Details
data.description: Amkor Technology, Inc. (NASDAQ: AMKR) released its first-quarter results, surpassing analyst expectations for both revenue and earnings. The company reported earnings of 33 cents per share, exceeding the consensus estimate of 22 cents per share. The stock movement following the announcement is noteworthy. For more information, the complete story can be found on Benzinga.com.
Hillman Reports First Quarter 2026 Results

data.title: 4/27 Price predictions for SPX, DXY, BTC, ETH, XRP, BNB, SOL, DOGE, HYPE, ADA. BTC struggles below $80,000 as trend debate continues.
data.description: The price of Bitcoin fell short of reaching $80,000, sparking a debate among analysts about whether the cryptocurrency has shifted its trend or is still under the control of the bear market.

data.title: 30,000 ETH pledged for rsETH recovery after $290M bridge exploit rattled DeFi, sparking coordinated efforts.
data.description: After experiencing a $290 million exploit on the rsETH bridge, the DeFi markets were thrown into disarray, prompting a coordinated effort to recover from the incident. Subsequently, funding has been secured to support these efforts.

data.title: Ten North Carolina Community Colleges Selected for $2.5 Million Careers Electric™ Training Network
data.description: Raleigh, North Carolina - In April 27, 2026, the North Carolina Community College System (NCCCS) revealed the ten community colleges that will lead the state-wide expansion of the Careers Electric™ program. Launched in February, this initiative aims to enhance the electrical workforce. The program has garnered attention for its innovative approach and is set to reach a significant number of individuals across the state.

data.title: Benchmark Senior Living at Putnam Farm Assisted Living Community Named Among Nation's Best in 2026 U.S. News & World Report Senior Living Ratings
data.description: Danvers, Massachusetts - On April 27, 2026, Benchmark Senior Living at Putnam Farm in Danvers received accolades for being named one of the top senior living communities thanks to positive feedback from residents and their families. This assisted living and mind & memory care facility has earned top honors for its exceptional services.

data.title: The Falls at Cordingly Dam Assisted Living Community Named Among Nation's Best in 2026 U.S. News & World Report Senior Living Ratings
data.description: Newton Lower Falls, Mass. - In a recent announcement dated April 27, 2026, The Falls at Cordingly Dam, a senior assisted living community in Newton, has achieved top honors. This Benchmark Assisted Living and Mind & Memory Care facility garnered praise through resident and family feedback. The recognition positions them as one of the premier senior living establishments.

data.title: Solid Waste Authority Approves 40-Year Master Plan to Solve the Solid Waste Crisis in Broward County
data.description: In Broward County, Florida, on April 17, 2026, the Governing Board of the Solid Waste Authority of Broward County (SWA) gave the green light to a 40-year Solid Waste Management and Recycling Master Plan. This approval initiated a 120-day period for the SWA's 28-member advisory committee to provide feedback and suggestions on the plan.

data.title: Eight Student Teams Named National Winners of 34th Annual ExploraVision Competition
data.description: In McLean, Virginia, Toshiba and the National Science Teaching Association (NSTA) have revealed the eight national champions of the 34th annual Toshiba/NSTA ExploraVision competition, the largest K-12 science competition globally. The winners presented groundbreaking ideas aimed at addressing current global issues, such as healthcare, transportation, and environmental protection. This year’s competition attracted a significant number of participants, showcasing innovative solutions from students across the nation.

data.title: SmartRent Launches Value-Added Reseller Program
data.description: In Phoenix, a recent press release revealed that SmartRent has initiated a strategic value-added reseller program tailored for small and mid-market multifamily owners and operators. This program aims to provide specialized services to this segment of the market.

data.title: Dyno Therapeutics to Present New Capsids and AI Advancements in Gene Delivery at the 29th American Society of Gene & Cell Therapy (ASGCT) Annual Meeting
data.description: At the 29th Annual Meeting of the American Society of Gene & Cell Therapy, Dyno Therapeutics from Watertown, Massachusetts, is set to showcase cutting-edge developments in gene delivery. The company will introduce novel capsids and advancements in artificial intelligence technology. This presentation is anticipated to attract a significant audience and garner attention within the industry.

data.title: InTest Schedules First Quarter 2026 Financial Results Conference Call and Webcast
data.description: InTest Corporation, a leading provider of test and process technology solutions for various industries including semiconductor, automotive/EV, defense/aerospace, industrial, life sciences, and safety/security, will be reporting its first quarter financial results for 2026 on May 5, 2026, before the financial markets open. The company, listed on NYSE American as INTT, will also conduct a conference call to discuss these results.

data.title: Dyne Therapeutics Announces Upcoming Presentation Highlighting Robust CNS Activity in Nonhuman Primates with its FORCE™ Platform at 2026 ASGCT Annual Meeting
data.description: Recent data highlights the unique ability of the clinically proven FORCE platform to penetrate the blood-brain barrier effectively. This platform has shown promising results, demonstrating its potential in delivering treatments to the brain. The findings suggest significant advancements in addressing neurological disorders and other conditions that require targeted drug delivery. This innovative platform showcases a strong capability to enhance therapeutic outcomes by reaching the brain efficiently.

data.title: Matador Resources Company Announces Leadership Promotions
data.description: In Dallas, Matador Resources Company (NYSE: MTDR) revealed promotions on April 21, 2026. Christopher P. Calvert is now the Executive Vice President and Chief Financial Officer, while Glenn W. Stetson has been appointed as the Executive Vice President and Chief Operating Officer. These moves aim to enhance Matador’s dedication to execution, efficiency, and sustainable value generation. Both Calvert and Stetson bring valuable expertise to their roles.

data.title: Nucor Reports Results for the First Quarter of 2026
data.description: In the initial three months of 2026, Nucor reported significant financial results. Net earnings attributed to Nucor stockholders stood at $743 million, equivalent to $3.23 per diluted share. The quarter also saw impressive net sales amounting to $9.50 billion. Net earnings, prior to noncontrolling interests, reached $870 million, while EBITDA was recorded at $1.51 billion. The data was released in Charlotte, North Carolina, on April 27, 2026.

data.title: Benchmark Senior Living at Forge Hill Assisted Living Community Named Among Nation's Best in 2026 U.S. News & World Report Senior Living Ratings
data.description: Franklin Senior Assisted Living Community in Franklin, Massachusetts, was awarded top honors due to outstanding resident and family feedback. Benchmark Senior Living at Forge Hill, a community providing Assisted Living and Mind & Memory Care services, received recognition as one of the leading senior living facilities. The achievement was announced on April 26, 2026.
